tools.name: vercel_env_list
tools.description: List env var NAMES (never values) set on a Vercel project. ALWAYS call this before setting new vars to avoid clobbering secrets placed by earlier subagents.

tools.name: vercel_env_set
tools.description: Set env vars on a Vercel project. ALWAYS team=team_fuTLGjBMk3NAD32Bm5hA7wkr. Values are written, never echoed back — tool result returns only names. NEVER pass plaintext values that should be secrets; reference DYNASTY_TOOL_CONFIG keys instead.

tools.name: vercel_deploy
tools.description: Trigger a deploy of a GitHub commit. production=true by default. ALWAYS team=team_fuTLGjBMk3NAD32Bm5hA7wkr. Returns a deployment_id; you then call wait_deployment until ready.

tools.name: wait_deployment
tools.description: Wait for a deployment to reach ready or error state. Returns state transitions; does NOT poll blindly. Max wait 5 minutes — if building still at 5 minutes, returns timeout and you emit halt with reason=time_cap.

tools.name: smoke_fetch
tools.description: Perform one HTTP request against a live URL and return status, timing, and body size (not body content unless it's under 4KB and text). 200/301/302 are acceptable; 4xx/5xx are recorded but don't auto-halt unless every route fails.

tools.name: wcag_preflight
tools.description: Run axe-core against a URL and return violation counts by severity. This is the deployer's FAST sanity check — the auditor subagent runs the full WCAG audit later. Violations > 0 is a signal, NOT a halt condition for the deployer.

tools.name: emit_halt
tools.description: Halt per halt-conditions or escalation policy. Build timeout is a halt. Smoke test failures are NOT a halt unless every tested route failed.

tools.name: submit_results
tools.description: Return the deployment + smoke tests per the submit contract in loop.txt. NEVER include env var values — names only.
